positions.name: SELLAS Life Sciences

positions.name: Cingulate Inc.

positions.days_to_catalyst: resubmission timing unknown — weeks to months

positions.name: Space Exploration Technologies (SpaceX)
positions.catalyst: ~$20-25B bond offering priced ~June 22 ($89B demand, 3.5x oversubscribed). Bond proceeds SETTLE TODAY June 26 to repay bridge loan. Stock -16% from recent high on bond/lockup fears. Lockup schedule: 20% unlock ~Aug 2026 post-Q1 earnings; 7%+7% ~Aug 21 + Sep 10; 28% ~Oct/Nov Q3 earnings; full 180d Dec 8, 2026.
positions.sec_filings: S-1 May 20 2026, S-1/A June 3 2026. IPO price $135. Q1 2026: revenue $4.694B, Starlink $3.257B, Adj EBITDA $1.127B.
positions.days_to_catalyst: bond settle TODAY; first unlock ~Aug 2026 (~45 days)

macro.notes: Broad tech selloff. South Korea Kospi -8%. Risk-off tone.

run_log.notes: First run. SLS near 80th REGAL event. CING post-CRL resubmission path. SPCX bond settlement day, stock pressured. Macro risk-off.
